updateNote: Day 71 12:04 PM PT refresh — US F/A-18s from USS George H.W. Bush disable 2 Iranian tankers (Sea Star III, Sevda) in Gulf of Oman May 8 — Iran claims 10 wounded, 5 missing. Iran missile-drone-small-boat attack on US destroyers Truxtun, Mason, Rafael Peralta in Hormuz; CENTCOM strikes Bandar Abbas/Qeshm/Bandar Kargan ports. UAE intercepts 2 BMs + 3 drones (3 injured). IDF 85+ Hezbollah strikes May 9; Beqaa underground weapons facility destroyed. 19+ killed Lebanon May 9; 3 IDF reservists wounded by Hezbollah drones at Shlomi. Hezbollah claims Mt. Meron drone swarm (first since April truce). Trump dismisses as 'love tap,' threatens Project Freedom Plus. Pezeshkian-Mojtaba 2.5hr meeting on US 14-point MOU. Brent $101.29 (+26.9%), WTI $95.60 (+26.6%). Gas $4.530 (+48.5%). S&P 500 record 7,398.93. Hormuz Day 68.
